channel.title: Isometric Tactical Strategy on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Isometric Tactical Strategy on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Bonaparte: A Mechanized Revolution
item.description: Take one French Revolution, subtract Napoleon, add a couple relatives you never heard about, and toss in a few giant mechs...

item.title: Welcome to Blaugust 2022: 31 game ideas from AI
item.description: This article is about the author's plan to use AI to help write their blog posts for Blaugust.
